message:
fix: Restore AVX-512 disable flag for CI compatibility

- Re-add -mno-evex512 flag for x86/x86_64 platforms
- Prevents libdeflate from compiling AVX-512 intrinsics
- CI runners don't support evex512 target feature
- Fixes 40 compilation errors: '_mm512_*' functions require evex512
- Revert debug CI changes (no longer needed)

This reverts part of commit 027bdf33 which incorrectly removed the flag.
The flag was there for a reason - CI runners lack AVX-512 support.

files.patch:
@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ jobs:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build --verbose 2>&1 | tee build.log; cat build.log | grep -A5 "error:" | head -100 || echo "Build completed"
+        run: zig build
 
       - name: Run Linux-specific CPython tests
         id: test-linux
